prerequisites: A DataScope API key generated from the account (config field `api_key`, required).
A `start_date` value to bound the initial data sync (config field `start_date`, required).

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: DataScope's external API authenticates with an API key. Provide it in the connector's `api_key` secret field. DataScope expects the key to be sent in every request as the raw value of the `Authorization` HTTP header (no `Bearer` prefix), for example `Authorization: <your-api-key>`.

setupSteps.title: Locate your DataScope API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your DataScope account. Your API key is found on the API tab of the Webhooks page (https://www.mydatascope.com/webhooks?tab=api). Copy the key value.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied key in the connector's required `api_key` field. This secret is sent on every API call as the `Authorization` header value, so it must be the exact key from your account with no extra prefix.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required `start_date` field to the earliest date from which records should be synced. The connector uses this value to bound the initial extraction window.

sources.title: Help with DataScope: locating your API key
